title: Channel (GSM v1)
description: A declared medium through which Interactions are carried — the constraint on variety/information flow between endpoints. Models how exchanges are carried (transport, capacity, protocol, reliability), not their meaning. Every Interaction is carried by exactly one Channel.

interfaces.description: Interfaces connected by this Channel. Derived from the Channel's Interactions: channelInterfaces(C) = { I ∈ Interface | ∃ interaction ∈ C.interactions : I.exposes(interaction.effector) OR I.exposes(interaction.receptor) }.

crossSystem.description: Whether this Channel's Interactions have endpoints owned by different Systems.
crossSystem.derivedFrom: Channel.interactions → Effector/Receptor Component ownership → System composition
